channel.title: DevOps on DevOps Saudi | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Riyadh
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on DevOps Saudi | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Riyadh

item.title: DevOps Staff Augmentation in Riyadh: The Iqama Problem and How Augmentation Solves It
item.description: Senior DevOps engineers in Riyadh are scarce and expensive. Iqama takes 8-12 weeks. Nitaqat ratios add complexity. Here’s the real cost comparison between hiring and staff augmentation in Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Building Cloud-Native on AWS in Saudi Arabia: NCA Compliance and PDPL Data Residency
item.description: AWS opened its Middle East (Riyadh) region in 2022. Saudi NCA data residency requirements and PDPL make it the default choice for Saudi workloads. Here’s how to build cloud-native with NCA compliance built in.

item.title: Saudi Vision 2030 and the DevOps Imperative: Why Giga-Projects Need Platform Engineering
item.description: Saudi Vision 2030 is the world’s most ambitious digital transformation programme. NEOM alone is hiring engineering teams faster than DevOps practices can form. Platform engineering is how you scale delivery without scaling the bottleneck.
